normalization_point: AI feature, user count, or ad tier launch remains Stage 1 until repeat revenue or contract value is verified.
Green needs repeated usage and workflow lock-in, not one product launch or one viral title.
AI/cloud/security demand gets credit only when it creates billable bottleneck or platform lock-in.
AI revenue is not enough if compute cost, capex, or restructuring absorbs the economics.
Rerating room exists only when the market still uses the old frame while repeat economics are improving; Loop 8 shifts weight from narrative rerating to evidence quality.
High-quality AI/platform evidence can still be 4B-watch if valuation moved first.
Operational trust and legal/data quality are hard Loop 8 gates; CrowdStrike, Roblox, Meta, and Netflix-style events can cap or break Stage 3.
